entities.name: Maintenance Log
entities.context: Action log saved in N5/runtime/ with timestamps and summary statistics

entities.name: N5
entities.context: System/framework containing runtime logs and maintenance infrastructure

entities.name: Dry Run
entities.context: Safety feature that previews changes before executing, enabled by default

entities.name: Protected Files
entities.context: Safety feature preventing modification of hidden files or git directories

entities.name: Name Collision Handling
entities.context: Safety feature that appends counter if target file exists

entities.name: Trash Instead of Delete
entities.context: Safety feature that moves duplicates to Trash folder rather than permanently deleting

entities.name: Detailed Logging
entities.context: Safety feature recording all actions in runtime logs

entities.name: Execute Mode
entities.context: Operational mode where maintenance actions are performed and logged

relationships.context: Logs are stored in N5/runtime/ directory
Dry run previews before execute mode performs actions
Detailed logging produces the maintenance log output
Both are safety features protecting against data loss
